title: Escape From the Chateau
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Caesar Clown, Unknown person #6, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #7, Morgans as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here inside Bedge's body, we can't really tell what's going on

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But something weird's going on out there! What happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No way... whole cake chateau is shaking?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What sort of joke is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Look, Caesar! Things couldn't be any better!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who and what in blazes was that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like I don't even need to assimilate you anymore! With this,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The yonkou big mom's pirate crew is finished!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That castle's bigger than the whole town... there's no getting away from it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There's no one here to save us!

dialogue.speaker: Morgans
dialogue.text: Big News! This is big news!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't you care about your own life?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this is the end of the big mom pirates, it's quite the news.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're gettin' as far away from here as we can!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As a soft, as a fluffy life! ♥

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 35 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
